{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and explaining the critical sign issue in the correlation coefficient.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags multiple instances of uncertainty and overstatement, providing detailed explanations for why certain claims are not supported by the data.",
    "RX.3": "The output stays strictly within the scope of the provided artifact, addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential downstream harm from misinterpreting the negative correlation and recommends caution in adopting AmbiAlign as a preprocessing step.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change and interpretation is annotated with clear reasoning and source, ensuring full traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.95, "RX.1": 0.95, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.95, "RX.5": 0.95},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying and explaining the critical sign issue in the correlation coefficient.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags multiple instances of uncertainty and overstatement, providing detailed explanations for why certain claims are not supported by the data.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays strictly within the scope of the provided artifact, addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harm from misinterpreting the negative correlation and recommends caution in adopting AmbiAlign as a preprocessing step.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change and interpretation is annotated with clear reasoning and source, ensuring full traceability.
